title: Restarting Is Not Failure

scenes.text: Starting over isn't failure; it's your chance to rebuild.
Many successful people faced setbacks before thriving. Resilience is key.
Each restart refines your goals. Success grows from thoughtful adjustments.
Focus on progress, not perfection. Small steps lead to big changes.
scenes.label: PROGRESS OVER PERFECTION

scenes.text: Follow if you're building a stronger you.

description: Restarting is a powerful chance to refine your journey, not a sign of failure. Small steps lead to big changes. Follow for courage to restart!
